title: The habit that rewired my productivity
description:
I stopped the day on purpose — and everything changed.

The shutdown ritual: 4 minutes, one sentence, say it out loud.

#Shorts #Productivity #DeepWork #SelfDevelopment
hook_visual: Close-up of a hand deliberately closing a laptop, text fading in over black: 'What if you actually ended the day?'
end_screen_cta: Hold on the closed notebook for 2 seconds, then cut to text: 'I have 6 more habits like this — follow for the full list.'
